name: advanced-terminal
description: Local terminal session control center for tmux and pty sessions.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace web"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n server,web,desktop -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace web" "npm run dev --workspace desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.validate: npm run build && npm run smoke
